task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Xbox Series X (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $499.00 and wholesale is $349.00. Product features: Gaming console with 12 teraflops of processing power and Quick Resume feature. Reference: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/consoles/xbox-series-x

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Xbox Series X. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Xbox Series X. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
